heading: Loan or gift of articles to ships’ sponsors and donors
label: 8766 Loan or gift of articles to ships’ sponsors and donors
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)7546(less applicability to ).34 U.S.C. 546h34 U.S.C. 546g(less applicability to § 2), .Aug. 7, 1946, ch. 804, § 360 Stat. 898The words “the sponsor” are substituted for the words “any individual who sponsored” for brevity. The word “ship” and the word “person” are omitted as surplusage. The words “the loans or gifts described in this section shall be made” are omitted as unnecessary, and the words “under regulations prescribed by him” are substituted for the words “subject to such rules and regulations as may be prescribed by the Secretary of the Navy” for brevity.
Amendments2018—, renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232, § 807(d)(8)section 7546 of this titlePar. (2). , substituted “section 8765” for “section 7545”.Pub. L. 115–232, § 809(a)

children.text: to the sponsor of a vessel the name plate or any small article of negligible or sentimental value from that vessel; and
to any State, group, or organization named in any article, material, or equipment, including silver service, given by it.section 8765 of this title
